overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking along a dirt trail through golden grasslands. A horse-drawn carriage passes by early in the clip, after which the character continues walking past a wooden signpost toward distant ranch buildings with mountains in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie trail with distant mountains

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes by on the left heading in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail through tall grass

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with two horses passing by on the left side of the trail

entered.detail: worn dirt path with grass growing in the middle
golden-brown tall grass covering the rolling hills
rocky mountain peaks visible in the distance
wooden utility poles with crossbars running along the trail

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide prairie trail with golden grasslands stretching to distant mountains. A horse-drawn carriage suddenly appears and passes closely on the left, pulled by two horses, before continuing down the trail. The camera maintains a steady walking pace along the dirt path.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail toward a wooden signpost visible in the distance

entered.detail: weathered wooden post with multiple directional arrow signs

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily along the open trail with telephone poles lining the path. A wooden signpost becomes visible ahead in the center of the trail, gradually approaching as the camera moves forward through the golden grasslands.

scene_state.functional_zone: trail junction with distant ranch buildings

events.description: slight turn to the right as passing the signpost, heading toward the buildings

agents.ego_description: passing the wooden signpost and continuing toward distant buildings on the right

entered.detail: cluster of wooden ranch buildings with sloped roofs in the distance
dark smoke rising vertically from behind the hills

segments.scene_description: The camera passes the wooden signpost on the left and continues walking with a slight rightward trajectory. Wooden ranch buildings become visible on the right horizon, while a dark smoke plume rises in the distance. The vegetation becomes slightly denser with scattered bushes.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching ranch compound with power lines

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the wooden buildings with power lines running alongside the trail

entered.detail: wires stretching between the telephone poles overhead

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the approach toward the ranch buildings, which grow larger on the right side. Power lines become prominent overhead, stretching between the wooden poles. The trail continues through mixed grass and scrub vegetation with the mountain backdrop remaining constant.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a prairie trail that transitions from an open golden grassland into the outskirts of a ranch settlement. It begins with a steady walk through wide plains under distant mountains as a horse-drawn carriage passes closely on the left. As the camera continues forward, the landscape is marked by a line of telephone poles and a wooden signpost that gradually emerges in the center of the path. The scene then shifts as the camera passes the signpost and veers slightly right, revealing wooden ranch buildings and a plume of dark smoke rising on the horizon amidst denser scrub vegetation. Finally, the perspective closes in on the ranch structures while power lines become prominent overhead, maintaining a constant view of the mountains in the background.
